title: Contrastive Summarization
scenario: Write a prompt for an LLM to generate a 7-sentence summary that highlights the contrasts and differences between two or more perspectives on a given topic. The LLM should identify key points of agreement and disagreement, eliminate redundant information, and condense the findings into a well-structured summary. The output should be a concise summary with proper grammar, syntax, and punctuation.
constraints: Must include headings for each perspective

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated summary adheres to the given constraints, including word count, tone, and inclusion of headings.
The summary accurately captures the contrasts and differences between the perspectives.
The summary effectively eliminates redundant information and prioritizes content that highlights the contrasts.
The summary demonstrates proper use of grammar, syntax, and punctuation.
